queries.question: Show both production and distribution companies with 500 employees.
queries.sql:
SELECT Companies.Name 
FROM Companies
WHERE (Companies.Film_Industry_Type = "Production Company" OR Companies.Film_Industry_Type = "Distribution Company") AND Companies.Number_Of_Employees = 500
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?companies a :Companies .
  ?companies p:name ?name .
  ?companies p:Film_Industry_Type ?film_industry_type_w .
  ?companies p:Film_Industry_Type ?film_industry_type_w2 .
  ?companies p:Number_Of_Employees ?number_of_employees_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?film_industry_type_w) = "Production Company" || STR(?film_industry_type_w2) = "Distribution Company")) && (STR(?number_of_employees_w) = "500" || STR(?number_of_employees_w) = "500.0")))
}

queries.question: Show all the production companies and add just the distribution companies with 500 employees.
queries.sql:
SELECT Companies.Name 
FROM Companies
WHERE Companies.Film_Industry_Type = "Production Company" OR Companies.Film_Industry_Type = "Distribution Company" AND Companies.Number_Of_Employees = 500
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?companies a :Companies .
  ?companies p:name ?name .
  ?companies p:Film_Industry_Type ?film_industry_type_w .
  ?companies p:Film_Industry_Type ?film_industry_type_w2 .
  ?companies p:Number_Of_Employees ?number_of_employees_w .
  FILTER((STR(?film_industry_type_w) = "Production Company" || (STR(?film_industry_type_w2) = "Distribution Company" && (STR(?number_of_employees_w) = "500" || STR(?number_of_employees_w) = "500.0"))))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show all the production companies and distribution companies with 500 employees.
